message:
test(orchestration): add comprehensive test suites for review orchestration

Created test_unit_orchestration.sh (16 tests) and test_e2e_orchestration.sh (6 tests)
for bd-l05s. Tests cover: argument parsing, prerequisites, run ID generation,
lock acquisition, repo derivation, cost budget enforcement, session tracking,
loop termination, prefetch triggers, and full E2E scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
